issue: Compose file contains extra top-level keys (tools-ui, whatsapp-webhook, health-monitor) that are not allowed by the schema, causing `docker compose config` to fail.
suggested_fix: Move the three extra service blocks under the root services key so docker compose config validates.

issue: README does not mention the local requirement that Docker must be running before `docker compose build && up` will work. This is a missing environment precondition.
suggested_fix: Add a Docker check / explicit precondition note in the README Getting Started section.
